chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH AT KARACHI CP D 496 of 2025 ____________________________________________________________ DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE ____________________________________________________________ 1. For orders on Misc. No.3386/2025 2. For orders on office objection No.3 3. For orders on Misc. No.2659/2025 4. For hearing of main case 17.02.2025 Mr. Ali Zaheer, advocate for the petitioner 1. Urgent application is granted. 2-4. Learned counsel states that the petitioner is in possession of property since 1991, however, fails to demonstrate the same from the record. Learned counsel further states that the property has been recently encroached and the petitioner has been illegally dispossessed. Once again learned counsel fails to demonstrate as to why appropriate remedy under the law vide Illegal Dispossession Act, 2005 etc. has not been taken. No case is made out to direct recourse in writ jurisdiction. Petition found to be misconceived, hence, the same is dismissed. Judge Judge Amjad
